sections.paragraph:
Original: חשׁם חשׁים חוּשׁים

Transliteration: chûshı̂ym chûshı̂ym chûshim

Phonetic: khoo-sheem'

BDB Definition:

Hushim = "who makes haste"
  1. one of the two wives of Shaharaim (noun proper feminine)
  2. the sons of Aher, a Benjamite (noun proper masculine)
  3. descendants of Dan (noun proper masculine)

Origin: plural from H2363

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
